# Progress snapshot

Rewritten each iteration. The three-file test: a fresh session should be able to
resume from this file plus contract.md plus feature_list.json, without reading the
chat. If it cannot, this file is not describing enough state.

The block below is regenerated by `.loop/update_progress.py` after every graded
run (wired into train.yml). Do not hand-edit inside the markers. Everything outside
the markers is human-maintained.

<!-- AUTO:BEGIN (generated by .loop/update_progress.py — do not edit by hand) -->
## Latest graded run (auto)

- **Date:** 2026-07-01
- **Model:** XGBoost, 28 features, 10,236 training samples
- **Test R2 (LPA):** 0.361  |  **MAE:** 4.23 LPA
- **Contract:** PASS (SHIP)
- **Committed on disk:** yes (models/model_metrics.json reflects this run)

## Next action

The blended retrain is now the committed model and passes the gate. Pick up the
next `queued` item in feature_list.json. Highest-value candidate is
`more-real-band-sources`: real disclosed-band rows carry the model
(kaggle R2 ~0.57 vs scrape ~0.22), so adding more license-clean disclosed-salary
data is the next real gain, not feature engineering.

## Bottleneck right now (Rule IX)

Data, not model. Documented ceiling ~0.5 with real bands, ~0.35 with quantized
Adzuna. Each daily scrape adds mostly quantized scrape rows (R2 ~0.22) that dilute
the real-band signal; dedup keeps shrinking the distinct real-band count. The lever
is more disclosed-salary sources, or up-weighting real bands further, not more
Adzuna volume.
